heading: Persons eligible under prior law
label: 1727 Persons eligible under prior law
text: Persons who have a status which would, under the laws in effect on , entitle them to the medical services, hospital and domiciliary care, and other benefits, provided for in this chapter, but who do not meet the service requirements contained in this chapter, shall be entitled to such benefits notwithstanding failure to meet such service requirements.December 31, 1957
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83section 627 of this title1976— substituted “1957” for “1958”.Pub. L. 94–581
